pages.title: About
pages.text: JunWei is a Security Researcher from Taiwan. A paranoid Pythonista who focuses on cybersecurity, reverse engineering, and malware analysis. And as a PyCon Taiwan Program Committee, presented at Black Hat, DEFCON, HITB, ROOTCON, GrayHat, PyCon Europe/TW/KR/MY/IN. He’s the co-founder of Quark-Engine and a security research group, TWBGC. 履歷 (Mandarin Version 中文版) Resume (English Version 英文版) The projects I am currently working on:

posts.title: pipenv
posts.text: Install from github1pipenv install -e git+https://github.com/quark-engine/quark-engine.git#egg=quark-engine First “quark-enigne”: user Second “quark-engine”: repo @develop: The branch what you want to install #egg=quark-engine: The package name that will be recorded in pipenv

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
